name: Lisas' Bacon Mushroom and Swiss Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, add all ingredients except for the cheese and bacon.
2. Cook and crumble the bacon, then drain well and divide into two parts. Place half of the cooked bacon in the meat mixture.
3. Add all but 1/2 cup of the shredded Swiss cheese to the meat mixture. Blend everything together and place in a casserole dish.
4. Top the meatloaf with the remaining cooked crumbled bacon.
5. Bake at 350°F for about an hour or until cooked through, then top with the rest of the Swiss cheese.
6. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly.
